name: Saroj Subedi
description: An introductory personal site for Saroj Subedi, using relevant information from https://github.com/ntn0de and https://ersaroj.com.np/
personaStyleGuide: Visual Anchor: ultra-minimalist code-editor elegance. Build the site as a calm, premium introduction for a software developer whose public identity is precise, modest, and technically credible. Use strong typographic hierarchy with a restrained editorial rhythm: large, quiet headings; compact supporting copy; generous negative space; and crisp alignment. Headings should feel engineered rather than decorative, with a mono-accent for labels, metadata, and small UI details. Favor a clean split-layout or editorial-split system with one dominant statement per viewport and concise supporting facts. Keep card usage minimal and structural, with thin borders instead of heavy fills. Shadows should be subtle and shallow, used only to lift key surfaces slightly; rely more on contrast, spacing, and stroke than on depth. Color rationale: draw from GitHub-like developer trust cues, with a deep slate foundation, soft off-white surfaces, and one intelligent green accent that signals building, progress, and code confidence without becoming playful. Spacing philosophy should be airy and deliberate, creating the impression of maturity and patience. Motion should be sparse: smooth fade-ups, line reveals, and understated hover states that feel like terminal feedback rather than marketing animation.
features: Brief about section using public profile details

sections.title: Intro
sections.description: Lead with the exact public identity from GitHub: “Hi , I'm Saroj” and “A passionate Software Developer from Nepal”, paired with the profile sentiment “going slow and steady”. This section should establish Saroj Subedi as a calm, capable software developer.
sections.layoutHint: Full-height editorial split with a large left-aligned headline and a narrow right rail for location, current company, and profile links; use mono micro-labels and a restrained entrance fade.

sections.title: About
sections.description: Summarize the public profile details: currently working at Plantura, likes solving problems and building things, currently building Nepali Calendar App for the Mac, and happy to help when asked about anything.
sections.layoutHint: Single-column reading layout with short statement blocks separated by fine divider lines; avoid dense cards and keep the copy tight and highly legible.

sections.title: Work
sections.description: Highlight relevant GitHub work through selected repository references such as mac-patro-native, hamro-patro-scraper, and blink-reminder, keeping the emphasis on practical software building rather than exhaustive portfolio coverage.
sections.layoutHint: Use a minimal stacked list with bordered repository rows, language tags, and small metadata treatment inspired by developer tooling interfaces.

sections.title: Connect
sections.description: Provide direct pathways to GitHub, LinkedIn, and the personal website reference, using the public profile links already associated with Saroj Subedi.
sections.layoutHint: Compact closing panel with clean text links, subtle hover motion, and no form-heavy treatment; make it feel like a precise handoff rather than a sales CTA.

branding.aesthetic: A premium developer profile aesthetic blending GitHub-grade minimalism with quiet editorial polish.

imagery.style: Abstract, low-noise developer-themed placeholders with terminal textures, code-grid patterns, and restrained environmental portraits if needed
